summary: Iter 213 frontend-only UI/UX cleanup verified. All 4 forbidden strings removed from the Contribution Calculator tab, the SuperOptimiser header now reads 'Contribution Calculator', and the 3 redundant info cards are correctly hidden when SMSFOptimizer is embedded. Compare-paths toggle works. Retirement Planner tab regression OK. All 15 regression routes return HTTP 200 with no JS page errors. JSX `>` escape on SuperOptimiser line 190 confirmed working (no parse error).

issues: Recharts emits repeated 'width(-1) and height(-1) should be greater than 0' console warnings on initial mount before tab content becomes visible — cosmetic, pre-existing, not introduced by iter 213.

hydration_warnings.issue: Hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Caused by an Emergent dev-tool injecting a <span data-ve-dynamic='true' style='display:contents'> wrapper inside <option> elements (SuperOptimiser.jsx line 285). Console error visible in dev but does not break the dropdown — appears to be tooling/dev-injection, not application code. Likely also present in iter 212. Flagging for awareness; if seen in production build it would need replacing the inline expression in <option> with a non-wrappable static text.

tests_executed.div293_jsx_parse_error_resolved: PASS (Div 293 alert renders with '>' escaped via {'>'}; alert visible in UI)
tests_executed.regression_routes_200: PASS (15/15 routes: /, /deals, /budget-exposure, /vault-documents, /webhooks-admin, /rbac-admin, /execution-rails, /adviser-hub, /adviser-compliance, /client-capture, /my-vault, /xplan-sync-hub, /advice-marketplace, /open-api-platform, /firm-branding — all status=200, zero pageerror)

action_items: OPTIONAL: investigate the hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' on SuperOptimiser FY selector. The wrapper appears to be injected by an Emergent dev tool, but if it persists in production it should be addressed (e.g., move the dynamic '· cap {amount}' text out of the <option> children via a sibling label, or guard against dev wrapping).
critical_code_review_comments: RetirementHub.jsx is clean and reads well — the {!embedded && ...} guard in SMSFOptimizer.jsx correctly skips both the H1 and the 3 info cards in embedded mode while preserving them for the standalone /smsf-optimizer route (though /smsf-optimizer is currently a Navigate redirect per iter 211, so this path is reachable only via direct embed=false invocation).

SMSFOptimizer.jsx still imports 'Landmark' and several lucide icons (Lightbulb, PiggyBank, Calendar, TrendingUp) — Landmark is used at line 472 (empty state) but PiggyBank/Calendar/TrendingUp appear unused. Minor — does not block.

Recharts repeated width(-1) warnings on hidden tabs suggest using AreaChart inside an inactive TabsContent causes premature mount; consider lazy-mounting charts only when their TabsContent is active or wrapping ResponsiveContainer with display:block guard.
test_credentials: No login. LocalStorage seeded: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser', selected_client='{"id":"thompson_family"}'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 213 UI cleanup verified end-to-end. All forbidden strings removed from the embedded Contribution Calculator tab; SuperOptimiser header is now 'Contribution Calculator'; SMSFOptimizer skips H1 and 3 info cards when embedded. JSX parse error on SuperOptimiser line 190 fixed via {'>'}. 15 regression routes all 200. The only outstanding observation is a hydration warning about <span> inside <option> in the FY selector, which appears to be an Emergent dev-tool injection rather than app code — flagged for awareness.
